title: White Eyes
description: This new mod adds a creature called White Eyes, he will stalk you in the shadows and watch you. He doesn't like light, he doesn't like to kill you. He also doesn't like water that much.
body:
Need a super high performance and easy Minecraft server at a good price? Try [godlike.host](https://godlike.host/?aff_id=1323) now!
![GodLike.Host](https://godlike.host/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/godlike_logo_horizontal_join_ua_v1.png)

White Eyes

**White Eyes** is an atmospheric horror mod that brings unease into your world. Instead of jumpscares and chasing, White Eyes haunts you with presence. He’s not like the others. He doesn’t rush at you, or spawn in to chase you down. He watches.

You might catch him at the edge of the woods, on a hill, or standing still across a lake. He doesn’t want to hurt you. He doesn’t need to. His presence is the scare.

But he’s not invincible. And he’s not mindless. White Eyes hates light, and fears water. You’ll notice he avoids open bright spaces too. He’s an entity of the shadows, and he thrives in places where darkness is everywhere.

If you try to kill him though... That’s when everything changes.
If you push him to his limits, he will get tired of playing games with you. He will attack. Do not anger him.

White Eyes is meant to unsettle you.

Credits
White Eyes features custom models and textures created by TexturePug, and is built with love, nightmares, and many "what if..." ideas by TexturePug and ZoeyDev. This is a mod made to mess with your head, just a little.

Install it, turn off the lights, and keep an eye on the trees.
White Eyes might be watching.
